summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Retirement Confidence Engine feature. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed all key elements: page loads at /confidence-engine, confidence score displays correctly (100% with default inputs), risk breakdown shows all 4 categories (longevity, market, spending, inflation), all 4 tabs accessible (Real-Time Modeling, Multi-Scenario, AI Insights, Settings), sliders for real-time modeling, Quick Actions buttons, Projected Outcomes statistics, and navigation link with NEW badge in sidebar under Calculators.

issues: Compliance modal appears on every page load - can be dismissed with Escape key or by checking checkbox and clicking 'I Understand & Accept'. This is a known issue from previous iterations.

seed_data_creation: Demo clients auto-generated by adviser-insights/dashboard endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retirement Confidence Engine fully tested and working. Backend routes: /api/confidence-engine/quick-calculate (Monte Carlo simulation), /api/ai-explain/explain (AI explanation with rule-based fallback), /api/adviser-insights/dashboard (adviser intelligence). Frontend at /confidence-engine shows confidence gauge, risk breakdown, projected outcomes, 4 tabs for different features. Compliance modal may block UI testing - press Escape to dismiss.

confidence_engine_api.POST /api/confidence-engine/quick-calcul: PASS - Returns confidence score, risk breakdown, statistics from Monte Carlo simulation
confidence_engine_api.GET /api/confidence-engine/risk-factors: PASS - Returns 4 risk factor descriptions (longevity, market, spending, inflation)
confidence_engine_api.GET /api/confidence-engine/asset-classes: PASS - Returns asset class parameters with expected returns and volatility
confidence_engine_api.GET /api/confidence-engine/history/{clie: PASS - Returns calculation history for client

ai_explanation_api.POST /api/ai-explain/explain: PASS - Returns AI explanation (rule-based fallback when LLM key not set)
ai_explanation_api.POST /api/ai-explain/client-summary: PASS - Returns client-friendly summary with status and actions

adviser_intelligence_api.GET /api/adviser-insights/dashboard: PASS - Returns summary, alerts, opportunities, insights, confidence distribution
adviser_intelligence_api.GET /api/adviser-insights/clients: PASS - Returns client list with sorting
adviser_intelligence_api.GET /api/adviser-insights/opportunities: PASS - Returns opportunities with potential improvement

frontend_confidence_engine.page_loads: PASS - /confidence-engine loads Retirement Confidence Engine page
frontend_confidence_engine.risk_breakdown: PASS - Shows Longevity, Market, Spending, Inflation all at 0.0%
frontend_confidence_engine.projected_outcomes: PASS - Shows Best Case ($137M), Median ($57M), Worst Case ($21.5M)
frontend_confidence_engine.tabs: PASS - Real-Time Modeling, Multi-Scenario, AI Insights, Settings tabs present
frontend_confidence_engine.sliders: PASS - Current Age, Retirement Age, Life Expectancy, Net Worth, Annual Income, Annual Expenses
frontend_confidence_engine.quick_actions: PASS - Work 2 more years, Reduce expenses by 10%, Save additional $100k, Plan to age 95
frontend_confidence_engine.navigation: PASS - Confidence Engine link with NEW badge in sidebar under Calculators

mocked_apis.note: AI Explanation Engine falls back to rule-based when LLM key is not set. Notifications are mocked.
